Headline: Leuconitocris acutipennis
Description: Leuconitocris acutipennis is a species of beetle in the family Cerambycidae. It was described by Stephan von Breuning in 1956.[1]

Headline: Joyce Van Patten
Description: Joyce Van Patten (born March 9, 1934)[2] is an American film and stage actress. She is best known for her roles in films like The Bad News Bears (1976), St. Elmo's Fire (1985) (as Mrs. Beamish), and as Gloria Noonan in Grown Ups (2010).

Headline: Skalnik Gracze
Description: Skalnik Gracze is a football club based in Gracze, Poland. It was founded in 1953. As of the 2024–25 season, they compete in the Opole II group of the regional league.

Headline: Tunapanda Institute
Description: Tunapanda Institute (Tunapanda is a Swahili word for "we are growing") was a United States-based non-profit organization operating in East Africa. With the goal of training disadvantaged young people, various free courses in technology, design and entrepreneurship were offered to increase the chance of graduates in the labour market.[1][2] The majority of its work is based in Kibera, a slum in Nairobi, but it has also operated in other parts of Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda.

Headline: List of Ninjago episodes
Description: Ninjago (previously known as Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu until 2019) is an animated television series. The show was produced by Wil Film ApS from the pilot episodes until the tenth season and by WildBrain Studios for the last five seasons. It is distributed by The Lego Group. It was created to coincide with the Lego Ninjago construction toys, and centres on the fictional world of Ninjago, telling the story of a group of teenage ninja and their battles against the forces of evil.
